title: YOUTUBE Q REVIEW Oh boy this dude
display_title: YOUTUBE Q REVIEW Oh boy this dude
wikitext:
[]: [YOUTUBE Q REVIEW] Oh boy this dude             Quote Post by chee » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:28 pm Okay, which one of you was this?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:29 pm *slowly raises hand, looks around the room, then puts it down*

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:29 pm I saw that earlier linked on /a/ and couldn't make it past 1 minute mark. Too much butthurt, even for me

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:30 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x6E3ztS6xJk someone needs to do this with 3.0

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:30 pm He sounds like a fag. It might have been me. I don't know. Lately I've been suffering from sporadic blackouts. The other night I woke up in a barn in rural Illinois wearing nothing but a raincoat and black lace panties.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:34 pm Got three words in, pressed pause, laughed, moved on.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:36 pm I've never heard someone so rabid.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:36 pm people getting mad about cartoon, on the internet?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:38 pm What I find funniest about this thing is how /a/nons were dissing the video and guy to hell and back again when they've been for 10+ threads in the same general maximum anal devastation mode over what happens to Rei/Kaworu/Asuka/insert-your-favourite-here. I admit it feels even more distraughting when it's not in text but audio form though

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:41 pm Xard wrote: What I find funniest about this thing is how /a/nons were dissing the video and guy to hell and back again when they've been for 10+ threads in the same general maximum anal devastation mode over what happens to Rei/Kaworu/Asuka/insert-your-favourite-here. I admit it feels even more distraughting when it's not in text but audio form though

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:57 pm Good grief! I think I must have led a sheltered life...

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:07 pm Sweeeet. We got a shout-out. We're all Asuka-fanboys? I take great exception to that. Its Mari I want to plough nine ways from Sunday *if* you don't mind. What? Shes 28 now. Its too much. Theres too much going on to quote. I clicked randomly and find him talking about people storming Gainax and burning the studio down XD This is the greatest thing ever. I hope to god it goes viral. He is at this moment the greatest human being on earth.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:13 pm well shit now that I'm listening to this this is pretty damn funny. "Misato's big titted whore who can't drive a car" "they all had chance to fuck Shinji and they all failed. It was Kaworu's turn now" "she was jealous so she killed him" too good, too good but I guess that's enough. Unless there's EGF reference later on...? I want to hear that! edit: how the FUCK did I miss that, it comes already around 1 minute mark Azathoth wrote: the distinction is the attachment of identity. nobody gives a fuck about people twisting their pantsus over anime on /a/ but the choices made by people on Youtube or uhhh EGF for that matter to affix their buttwrath to a name...

[]:             Quote Post by Noriko is my wife » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:17 pm Azathoth wrote: the distinction is the attachment of identity. nobody gives a fuck about people twisting their pantsus over anime on /a/ but the choices made by people on Youtube or uhhh EGF for that matter to affix their buttwrath to a name...

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:23 pm I think its these kinds of reactions that drew me to Eva in the first place. Graffiti on the animators offices? Death threats? Fanbase split down the middle over so many contested things? A guy dressed up as Guy Fawkes making hours of serious youtube commentary? 'Hells bells', thought I 2 years or so ago, 'I want in on this'. Anyway, you know what this is before you hit 'Spoiler', but its gotta be done: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:26 pm Noriko is my wife wrote: like this guy [URL=http://imgur.com/ZxMf8] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:31 pm Didn't Anno or somebody say that 3.0 would split the fan base in half? I think we can all safely say that it happened.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Nov 18, 2012 6:34 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Didn't Anno or somebody say that 3.0 would split the fan base in half? I think we can all safely say that it happened.

[]:             Quote Post by UBERGEEKZILLA » Sun Nov 18, 2012 7:37 pm LOL!!! this guy is gonna find a way into the anime world to kill misasoto somehow, hahhahah best rant i have ever seen

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Nov 18, 2012 7:51 pm Well... If he is serious, and I think he is; then we can only pity him for being that obsessed about a cartoon. and feel superior, because we are so much better.
